### Branch Cleanup Commands

To delete stale branches (requires GitHub admin access):

```bash
# Delete all stale branches (use with caution)
git branch -r --no-merged main | grep -v 'main' | grep -v 'HEAD' | sed 's|origin/||' | xargs -I {} git push origin --delete {}
```
